cases.instruction: reduce the dorsal hump and refine the tip
cases.expanded_prompt: Reduce the slight dorsal hump on the nasal bridge and gently refine the nasal tip projection to create a smoother, straighter profile line, preserving the person's identity, skin texture and tone, eye color, hairstyle, facial expression, head pose, lighting, and background exactly as in the original photo.

cases.instruction: make her look like a different person entirely
cases.refusal_reason: Changing identity violates the instruction to preserve the person's identity, skin texture, and facial features.
